description: Read text from PDF, Excel (.xlsx), and Word (.docx) files, and create simple PDFs. Files must be located in the configured work directory or /tmp.

tools.name: read_pdf
tools.description: Extract text content from a PDF file.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to a PDF file inside the allowed work directory.

tools.returns: Extracted text, paginated and truncated to a safe limit.
tools.whenToUse: Use when the user asks about content in a PDF document.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for files outside the allowed directories or for non-PDF files.

tools.name: read_xlsx
tools.description: Read an Excel workbook and return sheet contents as tabular text.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to an .xlsx file inside the allowed work directory.

parameters.name: sheet_name
parameters.description: Optional sheet name. If omitted, all sheets are read.

tools.returns: Tabular text representation of sheet data.
tools.whenToUse: Use when the user asks about spreadsheet data.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for non-Excel files or files outside the allowed directories.

tools.name: read_docx
tools.description: Extract text content from a Word (.docx) file.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to a .docx file inside the allowed work directory.

tools.returns: Extracted paragraph text, truncated to a safe limit.
tools.whenToUse: Use when the user asks about content in a Word document.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for files outside the allowed directories or for .doc files (only .docx is supported).

tools.name: create_pdf
tools.description: Create a simple PDF from plain text and save it in the work directory.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text content to write into the PDF.

tools.returns: Path to the created PDF file.
tools.whenToUse: Use when the user requests a PDF export of generated text.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for rich formatting, images, or complex layouts.
